name: Zenoti Wellness & Spa Management API
what_it_does: Zenoti REST API for enterprise spa, salon, wellness, and fitness management platform. Enables AI agents to manage appointments, client profiles, memberships, packages, inventory, employee scheduling, and billing across spa chains, salons, fitness studios, and medspas. Zenoti serves multi-location wellness enterprises with a unified management platform.
use_cases: Managing client appointments and service bookings from customer engagement agents
Processing memberships and package management from billing automation agents
Syncing employee schedules and service menus from operations management agents
Integrating client data with CRM and marketing platforms from loyalty agents
not_for: General healthcare/medical (Zenoti is wellness/beauty, not clinical)
Single-location independent operators without enterprise scale needs
Fitness-only platforms without full wellness management (use Mindbody)
best_when: A multi-location spa, salon chain, medspa, or fitness enterprise using Zenoti wants AI agents to automate client booking, membership management, and operational workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Client health and beauty service history is sensitive personal data. Membership and payment data requires PCI compliance.

auth.notes: Zenoti uses API key authentication in the Authorization header. Keys are account/center-scoped. Partner program for enterprise integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise wellness management pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per location; API access included for enterprise tier
pricing.notes: India-founded, US-headquartered. Enterprise wellness platform targeting multi-location chains. Used by Massage Envy, European Wax Center, and similar franchises.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enterprise SLAs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Client health and beauty service history is sensitive personal data
No public MCP server — REST API with API key auth
Multi-center model: each business location may be a separate API context
India-founded company with US HQ — data residency should be verified per deployment
No granular scopes — API key provides broad account access
Enterprise partnership required for production integrations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Client wellness and payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. API key auth. No granular scopes. Multi-center context management.

security_score_components.security_notes: Client wellness and payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. API key. No granular scopes.
